test.note: Added placeholder test file src/lib/utils.test.ts; services.yaml updated from 'bun test' to 'bun run test' to use vitest

lint.note: Added 'lint' script to package.json (tsc --noEmit) since it was missing

appliedUpdates.description: Updated test command from 'bun test' (bun's built-in runner, finds no tests) to 'bun run test' (uses vitest as configured in package.json)
Created directory-convention.md documenting that the project uses src/ paths (not app/ as referenced in AGENTS.md)
Added 'lint' script (tsc --noEmit) since no lint script existed. Added basic smoke test in src/lib/utils.test.ts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update all path references from 'app/' to 'src/' to match the actual TanStack Start scaffold structure. Key sections: 'Key Files' list, 'Coding Conventions', and any example paths. The project uses src/routes/, src/lib/, src/components/ — not app/routes/, app/lib/, app/components/.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review of project-setup feature found AGENTS.md references 'app/routes/__root.tsx', 'app/lib/bingo.ts', 'app/components/Board.tsx' etc., but actual files are at src/routes/__root.tsx, src/lib/utils.ts, src/components/. All future workers will encounter this mismatch.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the frontend-worker SKILL.md example handoff to reference src/ paths instead of app/ paths. The example mentions 'app/lib/bingo.ts', 'app/lib/items.ts', 'app/components/Board.tsx' which don't match the project structure.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: frontend-worker SKILL.md example handoff uses app/ prefix. Actual project uses src/ prefix. This could confuse workers following the skill procedure.
